key_items: Bitcoin Dives Below $75K for First Time in a Month as Crypto Liquidations Near $1 Billion
Analysts forecast a Bitcoin crash to the $60K level, revisiting 2026 low
Bitcoin ETFs Bleed $1.2 Billion in third most negative week on record
reasoning: Bitcoin is experiencing significant technical breakdown below $75K with massive ETF outflows ($1.2B in five days) and growing liquidation pressure ($941M), creating a cascade of forced selling. Multiple analyst forecasts for $60K targets combined with Mark Cuban and Trump Media selling positions signal weakening institutional confidence, though some positive developments like potential rate cuts and national Bitcoin reserve discussions provide limited upside offset.
risks: Continued liquidation cascades could trigger rapid descent toward $60K support as technical breakdown accelerates capital flight from overextended long positions.
